steps.prompt: You wrote 0 to 4 — now let's do 5 to 9! Find 5 — it starts going down!
steps.feedback: 5! Straight down, belly out, hat on top. Now find 6!
6! Curve down and round — closes at the bottom. Now find 7!
7! Across the top, then a sharp line down. Now find 8!
8! Two loops stacked — start at the middle. Now find 9!
9! Round at the top, tail down. 5, 6, 7, 8, 9 — you can write every digit!
